author: adiasg
content: The main thing to discuss (apart from questions about the doc) is which method to distribute the weak sub. state client teams are comfortable with. Refer to the “Implication for client teams” section for more info.

author: terencechain
content: A call sounds good. I’m more interested for the time line. Say theoretically mainnet launches at `T`. I imagine `T - N` is when we should have a client friendly spec and `T - M` or `+ M` is when clients should have sound implementations. Curious what everyone’s estimates on `N` and `M` are
